form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 6th in a Free For All on March 30 over 278m at this track behind Indy Grant beaten 11 lengths (16.64). Unbeaten in three starts from this draw. Key runner.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 4 on February 9 over 278m at this track behind Save Tonight beaten 7 lengths (16.66). Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Impressive performance to post a big 4.5 lengths victory in a Grade 3/4 last start at this track, clocking a dazzling 15.85 over the 278m trip. Expecting another bold showing.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (16.32) at big odds over 278m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at Hobart over 461m. Will be tested in this company.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 6 length fifth (19.79) at Hobart. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Going well prior to a break but was a little below best when resuming, finishing fifth in 19.80 over 340m at Hobart. Finds it hard to win but has a consistent record overall. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 278m at this track. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd over 340m at Hobart beaten half a length (19.51) behind Ticking Over in a Restricted WIN on April 2. Has run blistering time here with a 15.95 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.
